title: chevaliera digitata
intro: Chevaliera digitata, also known as Withania somnifera, is a plant species belonging to the nightshade family, commonly referred to as Ashwagandha. It is an adaptogenic herb used in Ayurvedic medicine to help the body adapt to stress, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ashwagandha include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Ashwagandha can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Indian medicine.
